summary: FairXI v1.0 release-prep validated end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest PASS covering rating PATCH (200/422/403), admin_token length (32 chars >= 30), join rate-limit 429, full match lifecycle regression, history empty, manifest+service-worker content. Frontend P0 install-button persistence PASSED: dispatched synthetic beforeinstallprompt at 390x844, opened/closed hamburger 5x — install-app-btn-mobile visible ALL 5 times, then dispatched appinstalled and button correctly disappeared. Desktop 1280 install-app-btn also renders. P1 CreateMatch inline validation visually confirmed (all 3 red errors 'Pick when...', 'Where are you playing?', 'Enter the total pitch cost...') + datetime input focused as first invalid. P1 JoinPage phone-regex inline error confirmed ('That phone number doesn't look right.'). P1 AdminPanel rating dropdown works — selected R5 via Select+Option testids, backend verifies rating=5 persisted. P1 PlayerHistory history-empty EmptyState renders for unknown phone. P2 lazy routes + PageLoader skeleton visible during navigation transitions; service-worker.js contains fairxi-v2 + SKIP_WAITING; manifest has 192+512 icons. P3 admin_token length >=30 confirmed (32-char urlsafe). P3 join rate-limit returns 429 after >30 attempts. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: InstallPromptProvider pattern is correct — listener now lives at App root and never unmounts, so the one-shot beforeinstallprompt is captured regardless of which InstallButton instance mounts later. Verified with 5x hamburger toggle cycles.

Cross-checked for other conditionally-mounted components owning one-shot listeners: UpdateNotifier (fairxi:update-available) lives at App root — fine. index.js registers SW at window load and dispatches events, also global — fine. No other one-shot listener misuse found.

In-memory rate_limit() uses per-key sliding windows keyed by 'create_match:global', 'join:{mid}', 'vote:{mid}' — reasonable for single-worker but 60/60 on create is global (can be tripped by an entire user base). For multi-worker prod, promote to Redis/nginx as the code comment already notes.
JoinPage phone regex ^[+()\-.\s\d]{5,32}$ correctly rejects 'abc' — confirmed live.
AdminPanel rating dropdown correctly rebuilds Select value from server response after PATCH, so no stale state after page reload.

PWA: service-worker skipWaiting is triggered by client message — good pattern; index.js dispatches 'fairxi:update-available' via CustomEvent with detail.worker so the toast in App.js can reload cleanly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for the P0/P1/P2/P3 items required by the review

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral test matches created via /api/matches (TEST_ prefix / UITest) — none persisted intentionally, backend has no cleanup endpoint but rate-limit prevents flooding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 install-button test MUST dispatch a synthetic beforeinstallprompt event via page.evaluate AFTER waiting for nav-menu-toggle to be present (i.e., after InstallPromptProvider effect has registered its listener). Chromium never fires this event naturally. Then repeatedly open/close hamburger and check install-app-btn-mobile — should stay visible. Then dispatch 'appinstalled' — button must disappear on next open. Rate-limit is per-process in-memory so consecutive test runs may hit 60/60 on create_match — sleep 60s between bulk runs if needed. Playwright's page.click on a submit button that is far below the fold sometimes lands outside the viewport and no submit event fires — use locator.click() (auto-scrolls) or requestSubmit() when clicking off-screen submit buttons.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues to root-cause. All targeted P0/P1/P2/P3 fixes work as designed.
